title: Technical Manager (12 month Contract)
description:
Job Scope:

  • Operations and Maintenance: Overseeing the day-to-day operation, maintenance, and safety of all technical infrastructure, including service EMS System, aircon, fire protection system.
  • Project Management: Planning and executing maintenance schedules (preventive and corrective), infrastructure upgrades, and capital projects.
  • Vendor and Contract Management: Coordinating with various stakeholders, managing vendor relationships, and overseeing Annual Maintenance Contracts (AMC) and service providers.
  • Compliance and Standards: Ensuring that all operations and projects comply with relevant safety standards, building codes of practice, and regulations.
  • Technical Support: Providing expertise and technical support to the construction or facilities team and coordinating with internal and external consultants.
  • Cost Optimization: Monitoring energy consumption and utility usage to identify and implement cost-saving initiatives.
  • Documentation: Maintaining all technical documentation, Standard Operating Procedures (SOPs), and maintenance logs.

Requirement:

  • Experience 2-3years.
  • Good English Communications and written skills
  • Able to handle high volume of paperwork with accurately.
  • Able to use MS Office, and Work Order System

EA Personnel Name: Jackie Ng

EA Personnel No: R22109024

EA License No: 95C5411

postedCompany.description:
PrimeStaff was incorporated in 1994 with the sole objective of providing quality services in recruitment and human resource management and development. With over a decade of experience in Singapore, we operate across the public and private sectors, dealing from permanent positions, contract roles to temporary assignments.
 
Assisting jobseekers and employers, PrimeStaff’s expertise spans across the Asia Pacific region. Our aim is to give employers quality staffing and individual candidates greater opportunities to succeed in their careers through a broad range of contacts and expertise.

We have succeeded in transforming a conventional business concept into one that embraces technology, without sacrificing that all-important personal touch.
 
At PrimeStaff, we are passionate about people.
postedCompany.name: PRIMESTAFF MANAGEMENT SERVICES PTE LTD
